# Story 1.5: Auth Backend Endpoints вЂ” Login + Refresh + Logout

Status: done

<!-- Generated by BMad create-story workflow on 2026-05-10. Ultimate context engine analysis completed - comprehensive developer guide created. -->

## Story

As an authenticated user (admin or cashier),  
I want gб»Ќi `POST /api/v1/auth/login` bбє±ng email/password Д‘б»ѓ nhбє­n access token JWT 7 ngГ y + refresh token cookie, gб»Ќi `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh` Д‘б»ѓ rotate access token, vГ  gб»Ќi `POST /api/v1/auth/logout` Д‘б»ѓ clear session,  
so that client web cГі thб»ѓ bбєЇt Д‘бє§u phiГЄn lГ m viб»‡c, tб»± Д‘б»™ng lГ m mб»›i token vГ  Д‘Дѓng xuбєҐt an toГ n theo NFR8/NFR9/NFR10/NFR17.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. **Login thГ nh cГґng:** Given user `cashier@cafe.demo` Д‘ГЈ Д‘Ж°б»Јc seed, when client `POST /api/v1/auth/login` body `{ email, password }`, then server verify bcrypt password, trбєЈ `200` body `{ accessToken, user: { id, email, role, tenantId, storeId } }`; JWT `exp` Д‘Гєng `now + 7 days`; set HttpOnly Secure cookie `refresh_token=<rotating-token>` SameSite=Lax expires 30 ngГ y; set CSRF cookie `csrf_token=<random>`; insert `refresh_tokens` row gб»“m `id` UUID v7, `tokenHash` lГ  bcrypt hash cб»§a refresh token, `userId`, `expiresAt`.
2. **Login validation:** Given email sai format hoбє·c password trб»‘ng, when `POST /api/v1/auth/login`, then response `400 application/problem+json`, RFC 7807 `type=https://pos.example/errors/validation`, khГґng trбєЈ schema lб»—i tб»± chбєї.
3. **Login sai thГґng tin:** Given email khГґng tб»“n tбєЎi hoбє·c password sai, when login, then response `401 application/problem+json` vб»›i `type=https://pos.example/errors/invalid-credentials`, title/detail UI-facing tiбєїng Viб»‡t `Sai email hoбє·c mбє­t khбє©u`; khГґng tiбєїt lб»™ email cГі tб»“n tбєЎi khГґng.
4. **Rate limit login/refresh:** Given cГ№ng IP gб»Ќi login sai nhiб»Ѓu lбє§n, when attempt thб»© 6+ trong 1 phГєt, then `@nestjs/throttler` trбєЈ `429 application/problem+json`; ГЎp dб»Ґng cho `/auth/login` vГ  `/auth/refresh`.
5. **Refresh thГ nh cГґng + CSRF:** Given refresh cookie hб»Јp lб»‡ vГ  `X-CSRF-Token` match cookie `csrf_token`, when `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh`, then verify refresh token chЖ°a expired/chЖ°a revoked vГ  `users.isRevoked=false`; rotate token bбє±ng cГЎch set `revokedAt` cho token cЕ©, insert token mб»›i, set cookie mб»›i; trбєЈ `200` body `{ accessToken: '<JWT exp now+7d>' }`; set CSRF cookie/header contract rГµ rГ ng cho client dГ№ng tiбєїp.
6. **Refresh revoked/expired/user revoked:** Given refresh token revoked/expired hoбє·c `users.isRevoked=true`, when refresh, then response `401 application/problem+json` `type=https://pos.example/errors/session-revoked` hoбє·c `.../session-expired` phГ№ hб»Јp; clear auth cookies Д‘б»ѓ client khГґng retry vГґ hбєЎn.
7. **CSRF fail:** Given thiбєїu `X-CSRF-Token` hoбє·c khГґng match cookie, when refresh, then response `403 application/problem+json` `type=https://pos.example/errors/csrf-failed`; khГґng rotate token.
8. **Logout:** Given client cГі Bearer access token hб»Јp lб»‡, when `POST /api/v1/auth/logout`, then server clear `refresh_token` + `csrf_token` cookies, revoke current refresh token row nбєїu cookie/token nhбє­n diб»‡n Д‘Ж°б»Јc, vГ  trбєЈ `204 No Content`.
9. **Layering + security:** Auth code tuГўn thб»§ Controller в†’ Service в†’ Repository в†’ PrismaService; Controller khГґng gб»Ќi Prisma/Repository trб»±c tiбєїp; Service khГґng truy cбє­p `req/res` trб»« thГґng tin cookie/header Д‘Ж°б»Јc truyб»Ѓn qua DTO/context; password/refresh token plaintext khГґng log/khГґng lЖ°u DB; refresh token chб»‰ lЖ°u dбєЎng hash.
10. **Tests/gates:** CГі unit tests cho `auth.service.ts` coverage в‰Ґ80%; e2e `test/auth.e2e-spec.ts` cover login в†’ refresh в†’ logout happy path; negative tests cover invalid credentials, validation, csrf fail, revoked session. Gates tб»‘i thiб»ѓu pass: `cd pos-api && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run test:e2e && npm run build`.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Chuбє©n bб»‹ auth module Д‘Гєng cбєҐu trГєc (AC: 1, 5, 8, 9)
  - [x] TбєЎo `pos-api/src/auth/auth.module.ts`, `auth.controller.ts`, `auth.service.ts`.
  - [x] TбєЎo `pos-api/src/auth/dto/login.dto.ts` vб»›i `class-validator` (`IsEmail`, `IsString`, `MinLength` nбєїu phГ№ hб»Јp) vГ  Swagger decorators nбєїu project Д‘ang dГ№ng.
  - [x] TбєЎo `pos-api/src/auth/repositories/refresh-token.repository.ts`; chб»‰ repository Д‘Ж°б»Јc chб»©a Prisma queries auth-token.
  - [x] TбєЎo/Д‘iб»Ѓu chб»‰nh `pos-api/src/auth/strategies/jwt.strategy.ts` nбєїu quyбєїt Д‘б»‹nh chuyб»ѓn `JwtAuthGuard` sang Passport strategy; nбєїu giб»Ї guard hiб»‡n tбєЎi, khГґng tбєЎo duplicate strategy vГґ Г­ch.
- [x] CбєҐu hГ¬nh JWT + module wiring (AC: 1, 5, 8)
  - [x] Import `AuthModule` vГ o `AppModule`; khГґng phГЎ `HealthModule`, `PrismaModule`, `LoggerModule` hiб»‡n cГі.
  - [x] DГ№ng `@nestjs/jwt` hiб»‡n cГі; secret Д‘б»Ќc `JWT_SECRET` vб»›i local fallback hiб»‡n cГі nhЖ°ng thГЄm README/.env.example nбєїu thiбєїu.
  - [x] TTL access token cб»‘ Д‘б»‹nh 7 ngГ y (`7d` hoбє·c exp numeric tЖ°ЖЎng Д‘Ж°ЖЎng); payload gб»“m `sub`, `email`, `role`, `tenantId`, `storeId`.
- [x] Implement login flow (AC: 1вЂ“4)
  - [x] Lookup user theo email case-insensitive trong phбєЎm vi demo hiб»‡n cГі; vГ¬ login chЖ°a biбєїt tenant/store, dГ№ng unique email demo hoбє·c query first by normalized email, nhЖ°ng khГґng expose ambiguity.
  - [x] Verify password bбє±ng `bcrypt.compare` vб»›i `passwordHash` seeded cost 12.
  - [x] Nбєїu invalid credentials: throw custom Unauthorized exception/problem type `invalid-credentials` vб»›i title tiбєїng Viб»‡t, khГґng dГ№ng raw bcrypt/DB error.
  - [x] Generate refresh token random Д‘б»§ entropy (`crypto.randomBytes(32)` base64url hoбє·c tЖ°ЖЎng Д‘Ж°ЖЎng), hash bбє±ng bcrypt trЖ°б»›c khi lЖ°u.
  - [x] Generate UUID v7 cho `refresh_tokens.id` bбє±ng `uuidv7()` tб»« package `uuid@11.x`; khГґng dГ№ng v4.
  - [x] Set cookies qua controller response options: `httpOnly: true`, `secure: true` theo AC; cГўn nhбєЇc `secure: process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'test'` chб»‰ trong e2e nбєїu SuperTest khГґng HTTPS, nhЖ°ng story behavior phбєЈi documented/testable.
- [x] Implement refresh flow + CSRF double-submit (AC: 5вЂ“7)
  - [x] Parse `refresh_token` cookie vГ  `csrf_token` cookie; validate header `X-CSRF-Token` equals cookie.
  - [x] Compare raw refresh token vб»›i stored `tokenHash` qua bcrypt; do not store/query raw token.
  - [x] Reject token expired/revoked hoбє·c user revoked (`User.isRevoked=true`).
  - [x] Rotate trong transaction: revoke old row (`revokedAt=now`), create new row, set new cookies, return new access token.
  - [x] Clear cookies on revoked/expired paths to avoid client retry loops.
- [x] Implement logout flow (AC: 8)
  - [x] Protect endpoint bбє±ng existing `JwtAuthGuard` or Passport guard; Bearer token required.
  - [x] If refresh cookie present, find matching active token for current user by bcrypt compare over candidate rows; revoke matched row.
  - [x] Clear `refresh_token` and `csrf_token` cookies; return `204` with no body.
- [x] Extend RFC 7807 problem types safely (AC: 2, 3, 6, 7)
  - [x] Add constants to `src/common/errors/problem-types.ts`: `invalidCredentials`, `csrfFailed`, `sessionRevoked`, `sessionExpired`, `rateLimited` if needed.
  - [x] Update `ProblemDetailsFilter` or create typed HttpExceptions so custom `type/title/detail` survive sanitization; preserve existing validation/unauthorized/forbidden behavior and tests.
  - [x] Ensure all auth errors return `application/problem+json`, not `{ message: ... }` default Nest body.
- [x] Add throttling for auth endpoints (AC: 4)
  - [x] Use `@nestjs/throttler` already installed; configure/import `ThrottlerModule` if Story 1.3 has not already done so.
  - [x] Apply `@Throttle` or module-level guard to `/auth/login` and `/auth/refresh`: в‰Ґ6 attempts/min should be blocked.
  - [x] Keep `/health` unauthenticated and unaffected.
- [x] Tests and documentation (AC: 10)
  - [x] Unit-test AuthService login/refresh/logout with mocked repositories/JwtService/bcrypt boundaries.
  - [x] Add e2e file under `pos-api/test/auth.e2e-spec.ts`; if `test/` config absent, create minimal Nest e2e setup consistent with Nest CLI.
  - [x] Test cookies (`Set-Cookie` includes HttpOnly/SameSite/Secure where environment permits), JWT exp roughly now+7d, refresh rotation revokes old token.
  - [x] Update `pos-api/README.md` with auth endpoint examples and demo credentials only; do not document secrets.
  - [x] Run gates and update Dev Agent Record.

## Dev Notes

### Scope boundaries

- Story nГ y lГ  backend auth endpoints only: `POST /api/v1/auth/login`, `/refresh`, `/logout`. KhГґng implement admin revoke endpoint `/api/v1/auth/sessions/:userId/revoke` (Story 1.6), khГґng implement FE login/token IndexedDB/interceptor (Stories 1.8вЂ“1.9), khГґng implement menu/orders/report APIs. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md#Story 1.5`; `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md#Story 1.6`]
- Preserve existing Story 1.1вЂ“1.4 changes. Current working tree already contains uncommitted Story 1.4 implementation artifacts; do not overwrite seed/Prisma adapter work unless auth needs a compatible import. [Source: `git status`; `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-4-...md`]

### Current codebase state to preserve

- `pos-api` uses NestJS 11, Prisma 7.8, PostgreSQL 16, TypeScript strict, npm. Dependencies already include `@nestjs/jwt`, `@nestjs/passport`, `passport-jwt`, `bcrypt`, `class-validator`, `@nestjs/throttler`, `uuid`. Do not swap libraries. [Source: `pos-api/package.json`; `_bmad-output/project-context.md`]
- Existing bootstrap already sets global prefix `api/v1`, CORS `credentials: true`, Helmet CSP, global `ValidationPipe`, global `ProblemDetailsFilter`, Swagger in non-production. Auth controller should use route prefix `auth`, not hardcode `/api/v1`. [Source: `pos-api/src/main.ts`]
- Existing `JwtAuthGuard` verifies Bearer token via `JwtService`, sets `request.user`, and sets `request.tenantContext` from JWT payload. Reuse or deliberately refactor it; do not create a second incompatible auth guard. [Source: `pos-api/src/common/guards/jwt-auth.guard.ts`]
- Existing `TenantScopeMiddleware` reads `req.tenantContext`/`req.user` before route guard execution; login has no tenant context. Auth login/refresh repository queries must not rely on scoped business Prisma extension. `User` and `RefreshToken` are excluded/root/auth models per Story 1.3 guidance. [Source: `pos-api/src/common/middleware/tenant-scope.middleware.ts`; `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-3-...md`]
- Prisma schema already has `User { tenantId, storeId, email, passwordHash, role, isRevoked }` and `RefreshToken { id, userId, tokenHash, expiresAt, revokedAt }`. Do not add a new token table. [Source: `pos-api/prisma/schema.prisma`]
- Story 1.4 seed creates demo users `admin@cafe.demo` / `Admin@123!` and `cashier@cafe.demo` / `Cashier@123!`; auth e2e may depend on seeded DB only if the e2e setup explicitly migrates/seeds or creates fixtures. [Source: `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-4-...md`]

### Architecture compliance and security guardrails

- Access token: JWT TTL exactly 7 days. It is used both for online Bearer auth and offline session gate on FE. Do not shorten to 15m or introduce a separate offline token. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md#XГЎc thб»±c & BбєЈo mбє­t`; `_bmad-output/epics.md#AR13`]
- Refresh token: rotating, HttpOnly Secure cookie, 30-day expiry for MVP per story AC; only store bcrypt hash in DB. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md#Story 1.5`]
- CSRF: double-submit cookie for `/auth/refresh`: cookie `csrf_token` plus request header `X-CSRF-Token`. Missing/mismatch must be `403` Problem Details. [Source: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/epics.md#Story 1.5`; `_bmad-output/epics.md#AR16`]
- Problem Details: all auth errors must go through global RFC 7807 filter with stable `type` URIs so FE can map actions. Avoid raw Nest default error bodies. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#Quy-tбєЇc BбєЇt-buб»™c`; `pos-api/src/common/filters/problem-details.filter.ts`]
- Password/token logs are forbidden. `sanitizeDetail` already masks token/password-ish strings; still do not pass raw secrets into thrown messages/log contexts. [Source: `pos-api/src/common/filters/problem-details.filter.ts`]
- UUID v7 required for new DB primary keys; use `uuidv7()` from `uuid@11.x` for `RefreshToken.id`. [Source: `_bmad-output/project-context.md#Technology Stack & Versions`]

### API contract details

- `POST /api/v1/auth/login`
  - Request JSON: `{ "email": "cashier@cafe.demo", "password": "Cashier@123!" }`.
  - Success `200`: `{ "accessToken": string, "user": { "id": string, "email": string, "role": "Admin" | "Cashier", "tenantId": string, "storeId": string } }`.
  - Cookies: `refresh_token`, `csrf_token`; `HttpOnly` required by story AC for both, though note double-submit normally needs JS-readable CSRF. If implementation needs FE-readable CSRF, document the deviation and prefer explicit story/architecture correction before changing contract.
- `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh`
  - Request: cookies `refresh_token`, `csrf_token`; header `X-CSRF-Token` equals csrf cookie value.
  - Success `200`: `{ "accessToken": string }`; also rotates refresh cookie and CSRF cookie.
- `POST /api/v1/auth/logout`
  - Request: `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>`; refresh cookie if present.
  - Success `204` no body; clear cookies.

### File structure requirements

Expected files to add/update:

```text
pos-api/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ src/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ app.module.ts                       # import AuthModule / Throttler if needed
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ auth/
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ auth.module.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ auth.controller.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ auth.service.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ auth.service.spec.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dto/login.dto.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ repositories/refresh-token.repository.ts
в”‚   в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ strategies/jwt.strategy.ts      # only if using Passport strategy
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ common/errors/problem-types.ts      # add auth-specific RFC7807 URIs
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ test/
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ jest-e2e.json                       # create if missing
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ auth.e2e-spec.ts
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ .env.example                            # document JWT_SECRET if missing
в””в”Ђв”Ђ README.md                               # auth endpoint examples
```

Do not place auth business logic in `common/`. Do not put Prisma queries in controller. Do not edit `pos-web/` in this story.

### Previous story intelligence

- Story 1.4 completed seed and Prisma 7 adapter setup; if auth uses Prisma Client directly in tests or repositories, import the existing `prisma-client-options` pattern rather than creating a second DB adapter configuration. [Source: `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-4-...md`; `pos-api/src/prisma/prisma-client-options.ts`]
- Story 1.3 already established ProblemDetailsFilter/Pino/tenant-scope/guards. Extend those, do not replace them. Regression risk: changing `ProblemDetailsFilter` can break existing tests for validation, missing tenant context, health, guards. [Source: `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-3-...md`; `pos-api/src/common/filters/problem-details.filter.spec.ts`]
- Story 1.2 schema uses UUID columns without DB default; application code must provide UUID v7 for new `RefreshToken` rows. [Source: `_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-2-...md`; `pos-api/prisma/schema.prisma`]

### Testing and verification requirements

- Minimum gates before review:
  - `cd pos-api && npx prisma validate`
  - `cd pos-api && npm run typecheck`
  - `cd pos-api && npm run lint`
  - `cd pos-api && npm test`
  - `cd pos-api && npm run test:e2e`
  - `cd pos-api && npm run build`
- Unit tests should mock bcrypt/JwtService/repository where possible; do not require a live DB for pure service tests.
- E2E tests may use a test DB; if local Postgres unavailable, mark blocker explicitly instead of claiming pass.
- Verify JWT exp by decoding token and asserting `exp - iat` is 7 days В± small tolerance.
- Verify refresh rotation by confirming old `refresh_tokens.revokedAt` set and new row exists.
- Verify invalid credentials response does not reveal whether email exists.

### Open questions / caveats for developer

- The story AC says `csrf_token` cookie is HttpOnly, but double-submit CSRF usually requires the browser JS to read the CSRF token and send `X-CSRF-Token`. If FE has no other delivery path, implementation should either expose CSRF via a safe response header/body on login/refresh or request a Correct Course. Do not silently make CSRF ineffective.
- Cookie `Secure` may complicate local HTTP SuperTest/dev. Keep production behavior Secure; tests can assert options via response headers or use environment-specific cookie options documented clearly.

### Review Findings

- [x] [Review][Patch] Refresh khГґng thб»ѓ phГўn biб»‡t token Д‘ГЈ revoked vб»›i token khГґng tб»“n tбєЎi/expired [pos-api/src/auth/auth.service.ts:63] вЂ” AC6 yГЄu cбє§u refresh token revoked trбєЈ `401` vб»›i `type=https://pos.example/errors/session-revoked`. Hiб»‡n `findMatchingToken()` chб»‰ gб»Ќi `findActiveCandidates()` lб»Ќc `revokedAt: null`, nГЄn refresh token Д‘ГЈ bб»‹ revoke sбєЅ khГґng bao giб»ќ match б»џ dГІng 63-65 vГ  bб»‹ trбєЈ `sessionExpired` thay vГ¬ `sessionRevoked`. Cбє§n lookup/compare cбєЈ revoked candidate phГ№ hб»Јp (hoбє·c repository method riГЄng) Д‘б»ѓ phГўn loбєЎi revoked vs expired/not found Д‘Гєng contract.
- [x] [Review][Patch] Test coverage thiбєїu revoked session vГ  rate limit 429 [pos-api/test/auth.e2e-spec.ts:113] вЂ” AC4 yГЄu cбє§u attempt thб»© 6+ trong 1 phГєt trбєЈ `429 application/problem+json` cho `/auth/login` vГ  `/auth/refresh`; AC10 yГЄu cбє§u negative tests cover revoked session. E2E hiб»‡n chб»‰ cover validation, invalid credentials, CSRF fail; chЖ°a assert throttling vГ  chЖ°a tбєЎo/gб»Ќi refresh vб»›i token Д‘ГЈ revoked Д‘б»ѓ kiб»ѓm tra `session-revoked`.

### Completion Notes List

- Implemented `POST /api/v1/auth/login`, `POST /api/v1/auth/refresh`, and `POST /api/v1/auth/logout` in dedicated Auth module with Controller в†’ Service в†’ Repository layering.
- Login verifies bcrypt password, signs 7-day JWT, creates UUID v7 refresh token rows, stores only bcrypt refresh-token hashes, and returns user payload plus cookies.
- Refresh implements CSRF double-submit via `csrf_token` cookie + `X-CSRF-Token`, rotates refresh tokens transactionally, rejects expired/revoked/user-revoked sessions, and clears cookies on retry-loop paths.
- Logout reuses existing `JwtAuthGuard`, clears auth cookies, and revokes matching active refresh token for the current user when present.
- Extended ProblemDetails support for auth-specific RFC 7807 types while preserving existing validation/guard/filter tests.
- Configured throttling guard/module and endpoint-level login/refresh limits.
- Added service unit tests and auth e2e coverage for login в†’ refresh в†’ logout plus validation, invalid credentials, and CSRF failure.
- Patched review finding: refresh now compares against all refresh token candidates, including revoked rows, so a matching revoked token returns `session-revoked` instead of falling through to `session-expired`.
- Patched review finding: added unit/e2e coverage for revoked refresh sessions and e2e 429 Problem Details coverage for both login and refresh rate limits.
